case_title: REINA AGUILERA VS. SOUTH OF MARKET HEALTH CENTER WESTBROOK, LLC

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH OF MARKET HEALTH CENTER WESTBROOK, LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY SAVITH IYENGAR, ASSISTANT US ATTORNEY RE: REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL THAT WAS RECD 10/21/22 **DENIED**REQUESTING PARTY IS NOT A PARTY TO THE CLAIM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF REINA AGUILERA IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNAN RAINTREE (#300563). DEFENDANT SOUTH OF MARKET HEALTH CENTER WESTBROOK, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL WINOKUR (INTERIM CFO). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOUTH OF MARKET HEALTH CENTER WESTBROOK, LLC DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
